com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXChangedObject


  • public interface IXChangedObject
    Each change recognized by the comparators are created as a changed object. It has details of the change made on an object. An object can have multiple changes. Each change object will have details of a particular change on a object , with respect to a comparatot registered. An object can be in more that one IXChangedObject.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods

      IXChangeDescription getChange() 
      IXChangeType getChangeType()
      What type of change is the object

    • Method Detail

      • getChangeType

        IXChangeType getChangeType()
        What type of change is the object
        Returns:
        Added, Removed or Changed

      • getChange

        IXChangeDescription getChange()
        Returns:
        What about this object has changed

      • getUid

        java.lang.String getUid()
        Used in comparators
        Returns:
        the uid of the changed object

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Returns:
        the name of the object

      • getObjectType

        java.lang.String getObjectType()
        Returns:
        the type of the object i.e. Device, Pin etc...

      • getBaseId

        java.lang.String getBaseId()
        Returns:
        the baseID of the changed object
